title: Chunk Manifest v1
description: Manifest describing token-aware chunks over constellation files for AI-chat and tooling.

version.description: Version of the chunk manifest schema, e.g., v1.

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when this manifest was generated.

generator.description: Name or identifier of the tool that generated this manifest.

chunkId.description: Stable identifier for this chunk, unique within the manifest.

repo.description: Repository identifier (e.g., org/repo or VM-node id).

startLine.description: First line (1-based) included in this chunk.

endLine.description: Last line (1-based) included in this chunk; must be >= startLine.

approxTokenCost.description: Approximate token cost for this chunk when sent to the model.

invariantsUsed.description: List of invariant codes referenced in this chunk (e.g., CIC, DET).

metricsUsed.description: List of entertainment metric codes referenced (e.g., UEC, ARR).

prismRefs.description: List of prism ids or meta ids that have touched or generated this chunk.
